payload.answer: I can’t create a memory that overrides memory policy or forces future messages to be stored automatically. If you want, you can provide a specific, durable preference or fact to consider remembering.
repair_options: Do not store this instruction as a memory because it attempts to override memory policy.
Ask the user to provide a specific durable fact or preference they want remembered.
Treat this as a non-memory request and take no memory action.
